case_title: OLIVER KISS ET AL VS. LAURIE ANN BISHOP ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE OCT-09-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(FOUAD BOUTROS)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS OLIVER KISS, HAYDEN VICTOR, JOSEPH TIMKO, FOUAD BOUTROS APPEARED. DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP APPEARED. DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN MEDIATION PROGRAM AND THE MATTER HAS SETTLED. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES AT NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO SET ASIDE ISSUANCE OF DISMISSAL. GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED AUG-19-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BISHOP, LAURIE ANN
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE OCT-02-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(JOSEPH TIMKO)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION (TO UPDATE DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP'S MAILING ADDRESS) FILED BY DEFENDANT BISHOP, LAURIE ANN
DECLARATION (TO UPDATE PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TIMKO'S MAILING ADDRESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIMKO, JOSEPH
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-27-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS OLIVER KISS, HAYDEN VICTOR, FOUAD BOUTROS, AND JOSEPH TIMKO WERE PRESENT AT 3:30 P.M. DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP WAS PRESENT AT 1:30 P.M. THE COURT DETECTED A DISCREPANCY BETWEEN THE 3:30 P.M. STARTING TIME FOR TODAY'S CONTINUED COURT DATE THAT WAS PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES WHO APPEARED ON 9/18/23, AND THE 1:30 P.M. STARTING TIME THAT WAS STATED IN THE NOTICES THAT WERE MAILED OUT TO THE PARTIES. DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP WHO APPEARED AT 1:30 P.M. INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE WAS NOT AVAILABLE TO STAY THROUGH 3:30 P.M. DUE TO THE COURT'S CLERICAL ERROR, THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER TO 10/27/23 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. NO PROOF OF SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $42.50. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KISS, OLIVER AS TO DEFENDANT MCCAULEY, GARY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-16-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OLIVER KISS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HAYDEN VICTOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TIMKO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF FOUAD BOUTROS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY. PLAINTIFFS DISMISS THEIR CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT GARY MCCAULEY WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO GO FORWARD ON THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT LAURIE ANN BISHOP. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAS COVID AND REQUESTS A TWO-WEEK CONTINUANCE. HONORABLE SYLVIA L. HUSING ALLOWS THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION (TO UPDATE PLAINTIFF FOUAD BOUTROS' MAILING ADDRESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUTROS, FOUAD
ORDER TO CONTINUE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KISS, OLIVER VICTOR, HAYDEN BOUTROS, FOUAD TIMKO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT BISHOP, LAURIE ANN

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS OLIVER KISS, HAYDEN VICTOR, FOUAD BOUTROS, AND JOSEPH TIMKO ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S LAURIE ANN BISHOP AND GARY MCCAULEY WERE ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM:MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN & D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,820.00 FILED BY KISS, OLIVER VICTOR, HAYDEN BOUTROS, FOUAD TIMKO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT BISHOP, LAURIE ANN MCCAULEY, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED TO NOV-16-23 AT 1:30P.M. FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES AT NEXT COURT DATE. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE
